use_cases: Displaying product announcements or feature highlights at the top of a page
Showing promotional messages with call-to-action buttons
Presenting important notices that users can dismiss
Communicating updates or changes to users in a non-intrusive way
ai_summary: A dismissible announcement banner component with a subtle grid pattern overlay and gradient background (lime to emerald). Features customizable icon, title, and action button with a close handler. The banner uses a glass-like aesthetic with semi-transparent borders and responsive flexbox layout that adapts from column on mobile to row on desktop.
